headline: Kroger (KR) Stock Gets Price Target Boost from Evercore; the Company Projects 1%–2% Comparable Sales Growth for 2026
summary: The Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) is included among the 14 Best American Dividend Stocks to Invest in. On March 9, Evercore ISI analyst Michael Montani raised the firm’s price recommendation on The Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) to $83 from $81. The firm reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. On March 5, Reuters reported that the company forecast […]
